classification_result.classification_rule: observed keys are receipted; non-observed keys with zero slot motion or zero C motion are proxy-invalid; all other non-observed keys remain source-unknown

keeper_line: A proxy can mark the easy absences; the hard absences still need a source rule.

source_status_implication.reason: The zero-motion proxy separates part of the non-observed universe, but most non-observed keys remain source-unknown. A native source rejection rule is still missing.
